# Claude Code Tray

> A native Windows (10/11) system-tray monitor for Claude Code usage. It shows your
> rate-limit usage percentage as a crisp, DPI-aware vector icon, projects when you'll
> hit 100% via burn-rate analysis, and provides a privacy-first 24h usage breakdown
> computed locally. Built in C# (.NET 10, WinForms + GDI+). Zero configuration — it
> reuses the OAuth token Claude Code already stores on your machine.

This is an unofficial, open-source community project (Apache License 2.0). It is not
affiliated with, endorsed by, or sponsored by Anthropic. "Claude" and "Claude Code" are
trademarks of Anthropic; the tool only reads usage data Claude Code already exposes locally.

## Features

- **Crisp at any DPI**: the percentage is drawn as a vector at the exact tray size (no downscaled bitmaps), sharp on 125–200% displays.
- **Task-Manager-style fill bar**: a vertical bar rises with usage; blue when on track, vivid red when projected to exhaust before the window resets.
- **Burn-rate projection**: short rolling history + least-squares regression projects when usage reaches 100%, warning before the reset.
- **Color-coded reset notifications**: when a usage window hands quota back, a bespoke on-brand toast (confetti + a refilling quota bar) appears, with a distinct color/headline per kind — clay "Surprise!" (early weekly reset), violet "Bonus!" (mid-window credit), teal "New week!" (routine weekly reset), blue "Fresh session!" (5h session reset). All on by default; each toggles independently in Settings.
- **24h usage insights**: local, cost-weighted breakdown by model, subagents, and large-context requests — read only from session transcripts, never message content.
- **Auth recovery**: on an expired token (HTTP 401) the tooltip shows a clear "not authenticated" prompt and an "Open Claude Code" menu item re-authenticates in one click.
- **Self-updating**: checks GitHub Releases and offers a one-click in-app update; per-user install, no admin rights.

## Data source

- Rate-limit data: one minimal Anthropic API call (Haiku, 1 token) every 5 minutes reads the `anthropic-ratelimit-unified-*` response headers, using the OAuth token at `%USERPROFILE%\.claude\.credentials.json`.
- Usage insights: read locally from Claude Code session transcripts at `~/.claude/projects/**/*.jsonl` — no API call.

## Links

- [Website](https://alegauss.github.io/claude-tray/): project landing page
- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/alegauss/claude-tray): source code
- [README / documentation](https://github.com/alegauss/claude-tray/blob/main/README.md): full setup, build, and troubleshooting guide
- [Latest release](https://github.com/alegauss/claude-tray/releases/latest): download the Windows installer (ClaudeTray-Setup.exe)
- [License](https://github.com/alegauss/claude-tray/blob/main/LICENSE): Apache License 2.0
